# CWE-640: Weak Password Recovery Mechanism (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-640-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"time"
)

// Safe: requires a single-use, time-limited reset token before changing the password.
func ForgotPassword(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	var body struct {
		Email       string `json:"email"`
		Token       string `json:"token"`
		NewPassword string `json:"new_password"`
	}
	if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&body); err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "bad request", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	var expires time.Time
	err := db.QueryRow("SELECT expires_at FROM reset_tokens WHERE email = $1 AND token = $2", body.Email, body.Token).Scan(&expires)
	if err != nil || time.Now().After(expires) {
		http.Error(w, "unauthorized", http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	_, _ = db.Exec("UPDATE users SET password = $1 WHERE email = $2", body.NewPassword, body.Email)
	_, _ = db.Exec("DELETE FROM reset_tokens WHERE email = $1 AND token = $2", body.Email, body.Token)
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
